violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Chemical bottle was emptied and refilled to adequate ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Sauce was placed warm in the walk-in in a large metal covered container. Sauce was broken down to smaller containers and move to ice bath to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. PIC emptied ice at time of inspection to clean unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Self closing component of door was broken. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The floors in the kitchen area has an accumulation of food debris/grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC stated equipment will be pulled forward at the end of day to clean facility. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
